text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Inari One's request, I'm helping out with the
festival preparations at her go-to shopping
district.
choice_data_list: Why are you in your signature racewear?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Cause it's a festival in the shoppin' district that
always supports me, obviously!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: This'll get everybody pumped and motivated!
Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text:
We're finally past the halfway point for the prep,
but we're not gonna make it in time at this rate.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa-ho, what's with the miserable mug?! You're
gonna suck the fun outta the festival like that!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you, Inari! Haha, you're right! It's a
festival after all! I don't have time to mope
around!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text:
I have to say, that outfit is fantastic! It's like
sunshine for my soul!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That's the stuff! Let's make this the best festival in
all of Japan!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper B
text_block_list.text:
Inari! I can't seem to get the roof of this stall set
up properly.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
If ya need a helpin' hand, all ya gotta do is holler!
Everybody! Come lend us a hand!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ready? Let's hoist the roof on the count of three!
One, two...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Keeping up the momentum, Inari One makes her
way around the site, pitching in wherever she's
needed.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whew! Preppin' for a festival really is half the fun,
ya know!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
'Course I did! I've been helpin' out at festivals
since I was a kid! Do it enough times and ya get
used to the work!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper C
text_block_list.text:
We got some trouble! A fight's broken out
between those two carpenters over there!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Leave it to me! Time for the great Inari to show
'em what's what!
choice_data_list: Hold on! Isn't it a little dangerous?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Don't sweat it! Breakin' up fights is second nature
to me! Besides...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It'd be a darn disgrace if I backed down from a
fight while wearin' my signature racewear!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One quickly shoves the rest of the fried
carrot she's eating into her mouth and makes her
way to the source of the commotion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I respect her feelings and follow after her, making
sure I'm ready to intervene if anything happens.

text_block_list.name: Arguing Carpenters
text_block_list.text:
You took the last fried chicken bento!
It's not my fault you're so slow! Just get a
seaweed one!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: These must be the two hotheads. All right then.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and take a good look, everyone!
Festival fights are the pride of Edo! I won't accept
anythin' less than your flashiest fisticuffs!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
So, you two'd better put on a good show! Ya got
an audience to please here!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper D
text_block_list.text: There's a fight happening? Who should I root for?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
So then, you two! What's this fight all about?
Judgin' by the commotion, seems like a helluva
clash of egos!

text_block_list.name: Carpenter A
text_block_list.text:
Um, well, it's not about ego. I mean, it's not really
a serious fight at all...

text_block_list.name: Carpenter B
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what the... You went and got a crowd together over
something so petty!

text_block_list.name: Carpenter A
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... I guess a seaweed bento is okay once in a
while! Fight's off, everybody!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Guess that's settled, then!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Piece o' cake! Especially since I'm wearin' this
uniform!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: It's kinda like a firefighter's uniform.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Folks know they're in good hands when they see
me rushin' in wearin' my signature racewear! They
get all excited to see me in action!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
With this on, I can run at full tilt and keep the
crowd happy!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whether it's on the track or anywhere else!
choice_data_list: Guess I'll have some fun too!
Guess I'll have some fun too!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whether it's on the track or anywhere else!
choice_data_list: Guess I'll have some fun too!
Guess I'll have some fun too!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: 'Course! Who do ya take me for?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: One day, the name of the one and only Inari will echo across the land!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
If I can't handle this much, even my racewear
won't be enough to hide the shame!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Inari One so determined, the people in the
shopping district all begin applauding.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Stick with me, and we'll have a blast wherever we
go!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Okaaay, let's start by enjoyin' the rest of the prep
work! Who's with me?

text_block_list.name: Shopping District Folks
text_block_list.text: Yeeeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, everyone comes together and cheerfully
finishes off the festival preparations.
